title: CLAUDE.md
text: repository R package arcgisrouting part R-ArcGIS Bridge. provides bindings ArcGIS Routing REST API documented https://developers.arcgis.com/rest/routing/. uses arcgisutils Esri JSON handling including date conversions geoprocessing parameters. use strong type checking via standalone type checks defined R/import-standalone-types-check.R always use rlang low level actions Errors warnings created using cli Wrting duplicate functions duplicate vectors banned validating type object always create reusable function. Comments shuold never describe function call . sapply() banned always use stronger typed apply() lapply() Always use compact() remove NULL elements list Always use #' @inheritParams documentation whenever possible. Never duplicate documentation manually Never try align arguments. Never add unecessary whitepace stylistic reasons.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Naming: snake_case R names mapping API names internally. Reuse name whenever concept across functions. Ordering: required spatial inputs first, core behavioral params, optional feature inputs, output control params, token always last. Defaults: NULL anything optional — dropped via compact(). Non-NULL defaults omitting surprise user. Validation: every validated param gets reusable function, never inline. Shared validators go utils-*.R, function-specific stay file. Pattern: NULL early return → scalar type check → arg_match → lookup vector API value. Never duplicate validator already exists. Spatial vs tabular inputs: use sf/sfc whenever geometry involved. Use plain data.frame attribute-tables. get dedicated as_*() converter using UseMethod dispatch — recognizing snake_case column names, validating types, renaming API names, serializing via arcgisutils::as_esri_featureset().

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: Finds one nearby facilities incidents based travel time distance.

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
code: find_closest_facility(   incidents,   facilities,   travel_mode = NULL,   default_target_facility_count = NULL,   travel_direction = NULL,   default_cutoff = NULL,   time_of_day = NULL,   time_of_day_usage = NULL,   u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   accumulate_impedance = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   attribute_parameter_values = NULL,   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   return_geometry = c("facilities", "incidents"),   directions_language = NULL,   directions_output_type = NULL,   directions_style = NULL,   directions_length_units = NULL,   directions_time_attribute = NULL,   output_lines = "true_shape",   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   preserve_object_id = FALSE,   return_empty_results = FALSE,   output_geometry_precision = 10,   output_geometry_precision_units = "meters",   geometry_precision = NULL,   geometry_precision_m = NULL,   locate_settings = NULL,   crs = 4326,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: incidents sf sfc object containing point geometries representing locations search . facilities sf sfc object containing point geometries representing facilities search . travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. default_target_facility_count default NULL. integer scalar. number closest facilities find per incident. travel_direction default "away". scalar character. One "away" (away facility) "towards" (toward facility). default_cutoff default NULL. numeric scalar. travel time distance value stop searching facilities. time_of_day default NULL. character POSIXlt scalar representing time day cost calculated. character vector provided, processed .POSIXlt() uses default time zone. time zone UTC parameter timeOfDayIsUTC set true. time_of_day_usage default NULL. scalar character. One "start_time" "end_time". Specifies whether time_of_day represents departure arrival time. u_turns default "allow_backtrack". Must one "allow_backtrack", "deadend_intersection", "deadend", "no_backtrack". Determines conditions U-turn permitted. use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. impedance default "travel_time". Determines travel distance measured. Must one "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Suppressed travel_mode. (Reference) accumulate_impedance default NULL. Calculate additional impedance metrics. reported, used calculating best route. values impedance. (Reference) restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. attribute_parameter_values default NULL. list objects. Additional values required attribute restriction. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. return_geometry default c("facilities", "incidents"). character vector. Valid values: "cf_routes", "facilities", "incidents", "directions", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers", "traversed_edges", "traversed_junctions", "traversed_turns". Use "everything" return . directions_language Character. Language code directions (e.g., "en"). Default: "en". directions_output_type default NULL. scalar character. One "standard", "complete", "complete_no_events", "instructions_only", "summary_only", "feature_sets". directions_style default NULL. scalar character. One "desktop", "navigation", "campus". directions_length_units default NULL. scalar character. One "miles", "kilometers", "feet", "meters", "yards", "nautical_miles". directions_time_attribute default NULL. scalar character. time-based impedance attribute used direction durations. output_lines default NULL (lines). scalar character NULL. One "true_shape" "with_measure". ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid locations. Default: TRUE. preserve_object_id default FALSE. logical scalar. Preserves object IDs input locations output. return_empty_results default FALSE. logical scalar. Returns empty results instead error failure. output_geometry_precision default 10. numeric scalar. Simplification tolerance applied output geometry. output_geometry_precision_units default "meters". scalar character. Units output_geometry_precision. valid values trim_polygon_distance_units. geometry_precision default NULL. integer scalar. Decimal places x y values response geometries. geometry_precision_m default NULL. scalar character. Decimal places m-values response geometries. locate_settings default NULL. list controlling inputs located network. crs default 4326. coordinate reference system output geometries. Passed arcgisutils::as_spatial_reference(). token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: named list. Elements present depend return_geometry: cf_routes: route features incidents facilities facilities: facility features incidents: incident features direction_points: point features direction maneuvers direction_lines: line features route segments barriers: point barrier features polyline_barriers: polyline barrier features polygon_barriers: polygon barrier features traversed_edges: traversed edge features traversed_junctions: traversed junction features traversed_turns: traversed turn features messages: status warning messages service

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
text: API Reference

title: Find Closest Facility — find_closest_facility
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  incidents <- st_sfc(st_point(c(-122.4496, 37.7467)), crs = 4326)  facilities <- st_sf(   Name = c("Station 11", "Station 20", "Station 24", "Station 39"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4267, 37.7486)),     st_point(c(-122.4561, 37.7513)),     st_point(c(-122.4409, 37.7533)),     st_point(c(-122.4578, 37.7407)),     crs = 4326   ) )  result <- find_closest_facility(   incidents = incidents,   facilities = facilities,   default_target_facility_count = 2,   travel_direction = "away",   default_cutoff = 3,   return_geometry = "cf_routes",   directions_length_units = "miles",   crs = 3857 )  result } # }

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: Finds best routes multiple stops using ArcGIS routing service.

title: Find Routes — find_routes
code: find_routes(   stops,   travel_mode = NULL,   start_time = NULL,   find_best_sequence = FALSE,   preserve_first_stop = TRUE,   preserve_last_stop = TRUE,   restrict_u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance_attribute_name = NULL,   accumulate_attribute_names = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   barriers = NULL,   polyline_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   directions_language = "en",   directions_type = "standard",   return_geometry = c("routes", "directions"),   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: stops sf sfc object containing point geometries representing stops visit. Use as_stops() prepare stops attributes. travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. start_time POSIXct character. time travel begins. Can "now" current time, POSIXct datetime, NULL static speeds. Default: NULL. find_best_sequence Logical. Whether reorder stops find optimized route. Default: FALSE. preserve_first_stop Logical. Whether keep first stop fixed reordering. applies find_best_sequence = TRUE. Default: TRUE. preserve_last_stop Logical. Whether keep last stop fixed reordering. applies find_best_sequence = TRUE. Default: TRUE. restrict_u_turns Character. Specifies U-turn restrictions. One : "allow_backtrack", "deadend_intersection", "deadend", "no_backtrack". Default: "allow_backtrack". use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. impedance_attribute_name Character. impedance use. One : "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Default: NULL. accumulate_attribute_names Character vector. Additional impedance values accumulate. Default: NULL. restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. barriers Point barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polyline_barriers Line barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. directions_language Character. Language code directions (e.g., "en"). Default: "en". directions_type Character. Specifies content verbosity driving directions (directionsOutputType REST API). One : "complete", "complete_no_events", "instructions_only", "standard", "summary_only", "feature_sets". Default: "standard". return_geometry Character vector. Specifies features return output. Valid values: "routes", "directions", "stops", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers", "traversed_edges", "traversed_junctions", "traversed_turns". Default: c("routes", "directions"). ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid locations. Default: TRUE. token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token(). return_directions Logical. Whether generate driving directions. Default: TRUE.

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: list containing routing resps. elements returned depend return_geometry parameter. Possible elements include: routes: Route features directions: Driving directions. element contains compress_geometry column per-maneuver segment geometry ArcGIS compressed format. Use decode_compressed_geometry() decode sf geometries. stops: Stop features barriers: Barrier features polyline_barriers: Polyline barrier features polygon_barriers: Polygon barrier features traversed_edges: Traversed edge features traversed_junctions: Traversed junction features traversed_turns: Traversed turn features messages: Status warning messages service directions_type = "feature_sets", response includes: direction_points: sf object point features direction maneuvers direction_lines: sf object line features route segments

title: Find Routes — find_routes
text: API Reference

title: Find Routes — find_routes
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(sf)  # Simple route between 3 stops stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Start", "Middle", "End"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),  # San Francisco     st_point(c(-122.0312, 37.3318)),  # Cupertino     st_point(c(-121.8863, 37.3382)),  # San Jose     crs = 4326   ) )  resp <- find_routes(stops)  # Route with time windows for deliveries delivery_stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Warehouse", "Customer A", "Customer B", "Customer C"),   time_window_start = as.POSIXct(c(     "2024-01-15 08:00:00",     "2024-01-15 09:00:00",     "2024-01-15 11:00:00",     "2024-01-15 14:00:00"   )),   time_window_end = as.POSIXct(c(     "2024-01-15 08:30:00",     "2024-01-15 10:00:00",     "2024-01-15 13:00:00",     "2024-01-15 16:00:00"   )),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),     st_point(c(-122.4083, 37.7858)),     st_point(c(-122.4313, 37.7793)),     st_point(c(-122.4000, 37.7900)),     crs = 4326   ) )  delivery_route <- find_routes(   delivery_stops,   start_time = as.POSIXct("2024-01-15 08:00:00"),   travel_mode = "Driving Time" )  # Find optimal order for stops sales_stops <- st_sf(   name = c("Office", "Client 1", "Client 2", "Client 3", "Office"),   geometry = st_sfc(     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),     st_point(c(-122.4083, 37.7858)),     st_point(c(-122.4313, 37.7793)),     st_point(c(-122.4000, 37.7900)),     st_point(c(-122.4194, 37.7749)),     crs = 4326   ) )  optimized_route <- find_routes(   sales_stops,   find_best_sequence = TRUE,   preserve_first_stop = TRUE,   preserve_last_stop = TRUE )  # Route with barriers barrier_pts <- st_sfc(   st_point(c(-122.4150, 37.7800)),   crs = 4326 )  route_with_barriers <- find_routes(   stops,   barriers = barrier_pts )  # Accumulate multiple impedances multi_impedance_route <- find_routes(   stops,   impedance_attribute_name = "travel_time",   accumulate_attribute_names = c("miles", "kilometers") ) } # }

title: Solve Service Area — find_service_areas
text: Solve Service Area

title: Solve Service Area — find_service_areas
code: find_service_areas(   facilities,   default_breaks = c(5, 10, 15),   travel_mode = NULL,   travel_direction = "away",   time_of_day = NULL,   output_polygons = "simplified",   split_polygons_at_breaks = TRUE,   overlap_polygons = TRUE,   merge_similar_polygon_ranges = FALSE,   trim_outer_polygons = TRUE,   output_lines = NULL,   split_lines_at_breaks = TRUE,   overlap_lines = TRUE,   return_geometry = "service_areas",   u_turns = NULL,   use_hierarchy = NULL,   impedance = NULL,   accumulate_impedance = NULL,   restrictions = NULL,   trim_polygon_distance = 100,   trim_polygon_distance_units = "meters",   point_barriers = NULL,   line_barriers = NULL,   polygon_barriers = NULL,   ignore_invalid_locations = TRUE,   output_geometry_precision = 10,   output_geometry_precision_units = "meters",   crs = 4326,   token = arcgisutils::arc_token() )

title: Solve Service Area — find_service_areas
text: facilities sf sfc object containing point geometries representing facilities around service areas generated. default_breaks default c(5, 10, 15). numeric vector specifying size number service areas generate facility. Units determined impedance parameter. travel_mode Character. name travel mode use. See get_travel_modes() available options. Default: NULL. travel_direction default "away". scalar character. One "away" (away facility) "towards" (toward facility). time_of_day default NULL. character POSIXlt scalar representing time day cost calculated. character vector provided, processed .POSIXlt() uses default time zone. time zone UTC parameter timeOfDayIsUTC set true. output_polygons default "simplified". scalar character NULL (polygons). One "simplified" "detailed". split_polygons_at_breaks default TRUE. logical scalar. TRUE, service areas appear rings breaks. FALSE, area disk facility break. overlap_polygons default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service area polygons different facilities can overlap. merge_similar_polygon_ranges default FALSE. logical scalar. Whether service area polygons different facilities break value merged single polygon. trim_outer_polygons default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service areas trimmed lie within distance network. Ignored use_hierarchy = TRUE. output_lines default NULL (lines). scalar character NULL. One "true_shape" "with_measure". split_lines_at_breaks default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service area lines split break values. overlap_lines default TRUE. logical scalar. Whether service area lines different facilities can overlap. return_geometry default "service_areas". character vector. Valid values: "service_areas", "sa_lines", "facilities", "barriers", "polyline_barriers", "polygon_barriers". u_turns default "allow_backtrack". Must one "allow_backtrack", "deadend_intersection", "deadend", "no_backtrack". Determines conditions U-turn permitted. use_hierarchy Logical. Whether use hierarchy finding routes. Default: TRUE. impedance default "travel_time". Determines travel distance measured. Must one "travel_time", "minutes", "truck_travel_time", "truck_minutes", "walk_time", "miles", "kilometers". Suppressed travel_mode. (Reference) accumulate_impedance default NULL. Calculate additional impedance metrics. reported, used calculating best route. values impedance. (Reference) restrictions Character vector. Restriction names honor. Default: NULL. trim_polygon_distance default 100. integer scalar. distance within service area polygon extends network. trim_polygon_distance_units default "meters". scalar character. Units trim_polygon_distance. One "meters", "kilometers", "feet", "miles", "nautical_miles", "yards". polygon_barriers Polygon barriers sf sfc object. Default: NULL. ignore_invalid_locations Logical. Whether ignore invalid locations. Default: TRUE. output_geometry_precision default 10. numeric scalar. Simplification tolerance applied output geometry. output_geometry_precision_units default "meters". scalar character. Units output_geometry_precision. valid values trim_polygon_distance_units. crs default 4326. coordinate reference system output geometries. Passed arcgisutils::as_spatial_reference(). token Authorization token. Default: arcgisutils::arc_token().
